steps.title: Write a in terms of b
steps.content:
If $a$ is $65\%$ less than $b$, then $a$ is $35\%$ of $b$.
$$a=0.35b$$

steps.title: Write c in terms of b
steps.content:
If $c$ is $60\%$ greater than $a$, then $c$ is $160\%$ of $a$.
$$c=1.60a=1.60(0.35b)=0.56b$$
So $c$ is $0.56$ times $b$. The answer is .56.
